pi_items.source: GCompris official screenshots page (gcompris.net/screenshots-en.html) and GSoC/2017 status reports confirming the activity is titled 'Digital electricity' not 'Digital Electronics'
Verified in setup_task.sh (line 17: rm -f /home/ga/Documents/digital_circuit_success.png) and export_result.sh (line 17: EVIDENCE_PATH="/home/ga/Documents/digital_circuit_success.png")

GCompris Digital Electricity activity does support AND gate components (verified via rudranilbasu.github.io blog and GSoC reports), but comprehensive list of all available components could not be independently verified. No authoritative source found that explicitly lists 'switch', 'and_gate', and 'bulb' as the exact component identifiers used in the activity.

privileged_info_summary: The GCompris Digital Electricity activity (the correct name, not 'Digital Electronics') is a real educational software activity available in GCompris that allows simulating digital circuits in real-time. The activity supports AND gate components and operates in both Tutorial Mode and Free Mode. The expected screenshot should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/digital_circuit_success.png. While AND gates are confirmed to be available in the activity, the exact component naming scheme for switches and bulbs could not be independently verified from available documentation.
